mapper.select: SELECT m.*, c.com_name, p.pay_date FROM member m LEFT JOIN company c ON m.user_id = c.user_id LEFT JOIN payment p ON m.user_id = p.user_id WHERE m.user_id = #{userid}

SELECT p.product_no, p.product_name, p.img_url, COUNT(review_no) AS reviewCount FROM product p LEFT JOIN review r ON p.product_no = r.product_no AND r.is_paid = 1 WHERE p.company_no = ( SELECT company_no FROM company c WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ) GROUP BY p.product_no, p.product_name, p.img_url ORDER BY p.reg_date DESC

SELECT p.product_no, p.product_name, p.img_url, COUNT(review_no) AS reviewCount FROM product p LEFT JOIN review r ON p.product_no = r.product_no AND r.is_paid = 0 WHERE p.company_no = ( SELECT company_no FROM company c WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ) GROUP BY p.product_no, p.product_name, p.img_url ORDER BY p.reg_date DESC

SELECT r.reg_date, r.img_description, r.is_paid, r.review_no, r.user_id, r.company_no, r.product_no, r.rating, r.content, r.thumbnail_url, r.updated FROM review r WHERE is_paid = 1 AND product_no = #{productNo} ORDER BY r.reg_date DESC
SELECT r.review_no, r.content, r.user_id, r.rating, r.updated, r.reg_date FROM review r WHERE IS_PAID = 0 AND PRODUCT_NO = #{productNo} ORDER BY r.reg_date DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE review SET updated = 0 WHERE DATEDIFF(NOW(), reg_date) >= 3 AND updated = 1
